name: @eval/desktop
description: macOS desktop shell for Eval Studio.
author: Eval Studio

scripts.dist: pnpm --filter @eval/web build && pnpm build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:signed: pnpm --filter @eval/web build && pnpm build && EVAL_DESKTOP_RELEASE=1 electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.release.yml --publish onTagOrDraft
